---
title: "Unrefereed Course Materials Setup"
---

Running this populates the subdirectories with the `.qmd` files based on the template below. Run it once if changes are needed to the format or styling of the individual file pages.

```{r}
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(DT)
library(gt)
```

```{r}

```


# This code chunk reads the `unrefereed_notes_list.csv` datafile to get the names of the `.qmd` files.

```{r}
#| warning: false

# replace NA entries with empty string

unref_files <- read_csv("unrefereed_notes_list.csv")
unref_files[is.na(unref_files)] <- ""
```



```{r}
#| eval: true

# generate names of .qmd files to be written

output_files <- ""

for (i in 1:nrow(unref_files)) {
  output_files[[i]] <- str_glue("{unref_files$short_name[[i]]}/{unref_files$short_name[[i]]}.qmd")
}

```



Testing the table output...
```{r}
#| echo: false

output <- unref_files |>
  slice(1) |>
  select(title, author, subject, pages, university, contact, abstract) |>
  t()

cn <- unref_files |>
  select(title, author, subject, pages, university, contact, abstract) |>
  colnames()

tibble(cn, output) |>
  gt() |>
  cols_align(align = "left") |>
  tab_style(
    style= cell_text(v_align = "top"),
    locations = cells_body()
  ) |>
  tab_options( table.width = "80%", column_labels.hidden = TRUE)

```


## Template for `.qmd` files (copy above code to display tables)

```{r}
#| include: false


# Define the content of the Quarto file

qmd_block <- ""

for (i in 1:nrow(unref_files)) {

block1 <- str_glue("---
title: \"Unrefereed Course Notes\"
---

\`\`\`{{r}}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(gt)

note_entries <- c(\"Title\", \"Author\", \"Subject\", \"Pages\", \"University\", \"Contact\", \"Abstract\")

note_data <- c(\"{unref_files$title[[i]]}\", \"{unref_files$author[[i]]}\", \"{unref_files$subject[[i]]}\", \"{unref_files$pages[[i]]}\", \"{unref_files$university[[i]]}\", \"{unref_files$contact[[i]]}\", \"{unref_files$abstract[[i]]}\")


tibble(note_entries, note_data) |>
  gt() |>
  cols_align(align = \"left\") |>
  tab_style(
    style= cell_text(v_align = \"top\"),
    locations = cells_body()
  ) |>
  tab_options( table.width = \"80%\", column_labels.hidden = TRUE)  


\`\`\`

")

  
block2 <- str_glue("    
- [Download File](./{unref_files$short_name[[i]]}.pdf)\n

")



block3 <- str_glue("
This course guide was donated to a collection originally gathered by MathNerds. The author retains copyright. You are free to use these materials for your classes. "
)



qmd_block[[i]] <- str_c(block1, block2, block3)

dir.create(str_glue("{unref_files$short_name[[i]]}"))
}  


walk2(qmd_block, output_files, 
      \(content, path) writeLines(content, path))

```
